sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n74243" key="o)cugala/ktinos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὀξῠ-γᾰλάκτινος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">η</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n74243.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">made of sour milk,</tr_> <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">τυρός</foreign> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">697</biblScope></bibl>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">12.272</biblScope></bibl>, cf. <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">6.518</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
